steps.t: Moist earth, the perfect breeding ground for worms, is just north of the fishing area and across the small bridge. You should dig up worms in the mois…
Petunia Hornblower is cowering near the Fishing Hole in the Shire. You should speak with Petunia Hornblower and tell her that the bait is ready.
The bait bucket is right where you left it, just to the north of the Fishing Hole. You should bait the fishing line for Petunia Hornblower.
Petunia Hornblower is likely still cowering at the Fishing Hole in Bywater. You should bring the baited fishing line to Petunia Hornblower.
